message: 🌱 Add opentofu: Unlocking Terraform's S3 Backend: Going DynamoDB-Free mission (#703)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentofu-599-unlocking-terraform-s-s3-backend-going-dynamodb-free",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentofu: Unlocking Terraform's S3 Backend: Going DynamoDB-Free",
+    "description": "Unlocking Terraform's S3 Backend: Going DynamoDB-Free. Requested by 108+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentofu deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentofu version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nhelm list -n opentofu 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentofu installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentofu configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentofu configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nkubectl get configmap -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentofu\n```\nThis RFC Propose  a significant enhancement to terraform's S3 backend configuration. The objective is to provide a DynamoDB-free alternative for state file locking, making our infrastructure management more flexible and cost-efficient."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Unlocking Terraform's S3 Backend: Going DynamoDB-Free",
+        "description": "RFC : https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/599\n```yaml\nterraform {\n    backend \"s3\" {\n      bucket = \"terraform-backend-ravi\"\n      region = \"ap-south-1\"\n      skip_region_validation = true\n      skip_credentials_validation = true\n      force_path_style = true\n      key = \"terraform.tfstate\"\n      lock_storage_type = \"S3Bucket\"\n      access_key = \"<access_key>\"\n      secret_key = \"<Secrete_Key>\"\n    }\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nkubectl get events -n opentofu --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Unlocking Terraform's S3 Backend: Going DynamoDB-Free\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "RFC : https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/599",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "terraform {\n    backend \"s3\" {\n      bucket = \"terraform-backend-ravi\"\n      region = \"ap-south-1\"\n      skip_region_validation = true\n      skip_credentials_validation = true\n      force_path_style = true\n      key = \"terraform.tfstate\"\n      lock_storage_type = \"S3Bucket\"\n      access_key = \"<access_key>\"\n      secret_key = \"<Secrete_Key>\"\n    }\n}",
+        "terraform {\n    backend \"s3\" {\n      bucket = \"terraform-backend-ravi\"\n      region = \"ap-south-1\"\n      skip_region_validation = true\n      skip_credentials_validation = true\n      force_path_style = true\n      key = \"terraform.tfstate\"\n      lock_storage_type = \"S3Bucket\"\n      access_key = \"<access_key>\"\n      secret_key = \"<Secrete_Key>\"\n    }\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "opentofu",
